converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Office of the Dean of Students records
Cornell University. Office of the Dean of Students
37-1-1384
16.3 cubic feet. 16.3 cubic feet.
1925-1979. Reports, correspondence, surveys, meeting minutes. Subject files, annual reports, correspondence, surveys, and other administrative files of the Dean of Students; includes fraternity and sorority matters records. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 11 24 - folder 1 12 (unprocessed) ======= 11 24 - folder 1 12 (unprocessed) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 3041587
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
N. Dean, et al.
Date completed:
February 2005
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, February 2005
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Subject files, annual reports, correspondence, surveys, and other administrative files of the Dean of Students; includes fraternity and sorority matters records.
RELATED MATERIALS
Includes collections #37-1-1103, #37-1-1168, 37-1-1384, and 37-2-m.969
Cite As:
Office of the Dean of Students records, #37-1-1384. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Cornell University -- : Students.
